About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Basic Education department is responsible for the education sector in the state.

For more information, visit the official website.


About the Programme

The ECCE Educator Recruitment programme aims to recruit eligible candidates for ECCE educator posts.

The programme is open to Bachelor's degree holders with a minimum of 50% marks.
